result.icb: NHS Lancashire and South Cumbria Integrated Care Board
result.ruc21: Urban: Nearer to a major town or city

requests.response_body:
<!DOCTYPE html>


<?xml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" version="1.0" encoding="iso-8859-1"?>


<html  lang="en" xml:lang="en">
<head id="Head1"><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html;iso-8859-1" /><meta charset="utf-8" /><meta name="keywords" content="Preston City Council" /><meta name="author" content="Preston City Council" /><title>
	Find My Nearest - Preston City Council
</title>
        
    <!--  Mobile viewport optimized: j.mp/bplateviewport -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0" /><meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
              
    <!-- Replace favicon iefix .ico &apple-touch-icon iefix .png in the root of your domain and delete these references -->
    <link rel="shortcut icon " href="../icons/favicon.ico" /><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
	

        <!-- load main scripts / styles -->
       

    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/jquery.js' ></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/jquery-ui.min.js' ></script>
    
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/cruise.js' ></script> 
    
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/validator.plugin.js' ></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/main.js' ></script>

     
    
    <!--
            
        
   

     -->

    

	<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main.css" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main-dark.css" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/mediaqueries.css" />
	<!--[if IE 6]>
		<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main-ie.css" />
	<![endif]-->
	<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/print.css" type="text/css" media="print" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/cruise.css" />
       

          <!-- Preferred style sheet enabled when the page is loaded -->

	<!--[if lt IE 9]>

		<style type="text/css">
			.iefix,.inputwrapper,.textareawrapper{
				behavior: url(/css/PIE.htc);
				-pie-png-fix: true;
			}
		</style>
        
       

	<![endif]-->

    <!-- www.Cludo.com search start CSS -->
    <link href="https://customer.cludo.com/css/122/1156/cludo-search-default.min.css" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" />    
    <!-- www.Cludo.com search end CSS   -->	
    <style type="text/css">   
        li.searchbar input {
         width: 240px;
        }
    </style>     
        


    <link rel="stylesheet" title="default" type="text/css" href="../css/pccforms.css" /><meta name="viewport" content="initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
    
    
    
    
    <script type="text/javascript">

        function disableButtonOnClick(oButton, sButtonText, sCssClass) {
            // set button to disabled so you can't click on it.       
            oButton.disabled = true;
            // change the text of the button.       
            oButton.value = sButtonText;
            // IE uses className for the css property.       
            oButton.setAttribute('className', sCssClass);
            // Firefox, Safari use class for the css property.  (doesn't hurt to do both).        
            oButton.setAttribute('class', sCssClass);
        }
    </script>

    <style type="text/css">    
        /* Some browsers don't make it obvious that a button is disabled so set this css class    
        to make the button obvious that it is grayed out and disabled. */    
        .disabled_button    
        {        
            float:right;
            color:#21BEE7;  
            font-family:verdana, tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;
            font-size:xx-large; 
            border-color:#21BEE7;
            background-color:transparent;    
             /*background-color:#21BEE7;   */      
            border:solid 1px #c0c0c0;   
         }
     </style>

    <style type="text/css">
        .widgetFrame {
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }

        #accessbar {
            width: auto;
            height: 1px;
            position: relative;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px 0 0 0;
        }

        #accessbar li {
            position: absolute;
            display: block;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background-image: none;
        }

        #accessbar a {
            height: 1px;
            display: block;
            text-indent: -9999px;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .roundedcorners thead tr p {
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .visuallyHidden {
            display: none;
        }

        #socitm_info_box_content {
            z-index: 99;
        }

        .skip_content{
        position: absolute;
        top: 0px;
        left: -1000px;
        background: #000000;
        color: #ffffff;
        padding: 10px;
        font-size: 12px ;
        }
        .skip_content:focus{
            left: 0px;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
        /*Used to replace the style for transaction buttons because the <a> should wrap the button - Email from Jon 23/10/2013 */
        a.transButton{
            width:190px;
            height:109px;
            background:url("/images/spritesheet.jpg") no-repeat -325px -69px;
            margin-top:10px;
            margin-bottom:10px;
        }

        a.sidebar-button {
            padding-left:70px;
            display:block;
            text-decoration:none !important;
        }
        a.sidebar-button span.title{
            padding-top:15px;
            display:block;
            color:#11b3db;
            padding-right:30px;
            font-size:1.1em;
            line-height:1.1em;
        }
        a.sidebar-button span.subtitle{
            font-size:0.8em;
            padding-right:30px;
            color:#163c6d;
            display:block;
            line-height:1.1em;
            padding-top:5px;
        }
    </style>

    <style  type="text/css">
    .topTaskIcon12440 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12440.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px; }
    .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12440,.big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12440 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12440.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .topTaskIcon12440 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12440.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12440,.dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12440 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12440.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px !important; }
    .topTaskIcon12466 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12466.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px; }
    .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12466,.big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12466 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12466.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .topTaskIcon12466 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12466.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12466,.dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12466 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12466.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px !important; }
    .topTaskIcon12465 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12465.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px; }
    .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12465,.big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12465 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12465.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .topTaskIcon12465 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12465.jpg) no-repeat -48px 0px; }
    .dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a:hover .topTaskIcon12465,.dark-template .big-button-nav ul li a.hovered .topTaskIcon12465 { background: url(/toptaskicon~12465.jpg) no-repeat 0px 0px !important; }
    </style>


    

    <script type="text/javascript">
		function disableButtonOnClick(oButton, sButtonText, sCssClass) {
			// set button to disabled so you can't click on it.       
			oButton.disabled = true;
			// change the text of the button.       
			oButton.value = sButtonText;
			// IE uses className for the css property.       
			oButton.setAttribute('className', sCssClass);
			// Firefox, Safari use class for the css property.  (doesn't hurt to do both).        
			oButton.setAttribute('class', sCssClass);
		}
    </script>


    <style type="text/css" media="screen">
        
        .dark-template .divCategoryRow 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
        
        .dark-template .divPropertyDetailsRow 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
        
        .dark-template .container 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
        
        .dark-template .container .ul 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
        
        .dark-template .listtext 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
        
        .dark-template .binText 
        {
            color: white !important; 
        }
       
        .
        
        .categoryDataDiv
        {
            width:100%;
            float:left;
            padding-top:1.5%;
            padding-bottom:1.5%;
            
        }
        .categoryDataMoreDiv
        {
            width:100%;
            float:left;
            padding-top:1%;
            padding-bottom:2%;
            
        }
        
        .content-text-sidebar ul
        {
                 /*color:Navy !important; */
                 font-size:small !important;   
        }
        
        #container {
            width:100%;
            float:left;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center; 
         }
        #container ul {
            width:60%;
            padding:1em 1em 1em 3.5em;
            border: 0.0em solid #999;
            box-sizing:border-box; 
    ... [truncated]

<!DOCTYPE html>


<?xml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" version="1.0" encoding="iso-8859-1"?>


<html  lang="en" xml:lang="en">
<head id="Head1"><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html;iso-8859-1" /><meta charset="utf-8" /><meta name="keywords" content="Preston City Council" /><meta name="author" content="Preston City Council" /><title>
	Find My Nearest - Preston City Council
</title>
        
    <!--  Mobile viewport optimized: j.mp/bplateviewport -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0" /><meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
              
    <!-- Replace favicon iefix .ico &apple-touch-icon iefix .png in the root of your domain and delete these references -->
    <link rel="shortcut icon " href="../icons/favicon.ico" /><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
	

        <!-- load main scripts / styles -->
       

    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/jquery.js' ></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/jquery-ui.min.js' ></script>
    
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/cruise.js' ></script> 
    
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/validator.plugin.js' ></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src='/Service/js/main.js' ></script>

     
    
    <!--
            
        
   

     -->

    

	<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main.css" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main-dark.css" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/mediaqueries.css" />
	<!--[if IE 6]>
		<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/main-ie.css" />
	<![endif]-->
	<link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/print.css" type="text/css" media="print" /><link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/cruise.css" />
       

          <!-- Preferred style sheet enabled when the page is loaded -->

	<!--[if lt IE 9]>

		<style type="text/css">
			.iefix,.inputwrapper,.textareawrapper{
				behavior: url(/css/PIE.htc);
				-pie-png-fix: true;
			}
		</style>
        
       

	<![endif]-->

    <!-- www.Cludo.com search start CSS -->
    <link href="https://customer.cludo.com/css/122/1156/cludo-search-default.min.css" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" />    
    <!-- www.Cludo.com search end CSS   -->	
    <style type="text/css">   
        li.searchbar input {
         width: 240px;
        }
    </style>     
        


    <link rel="stylesheet" title="default" type="text/css" href="../css/pccforms.css" /><meta name="viewport" content="initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
    
    
    
    
    <script type="text/javascript">

        function disableButtonOnClick(oButton, sButtonText, sCssClass) {
            // set button to disabled so you can't click on it.       
            oButton.disabled = true;
            // change the text of the button.       
            oButton.value = sButtonText;
            // IE uses className for the css property.       
            oButton.setAttribute('className', sCssClass);
            // Firefox, Safari use class for the css property.  (doesn't hurt to do both).        
            oButton.setAttribute('class', sCssClass);
        }
    </script>

    <style type="text/css">    
        /* Some browsers don't make it obvious that a button is disabled so set this css class    
        to make the button obvious that it is grayed out and disabled. */    
        .disabled_button    
        {        
            float:right;
            color:#21BEE7;  
            font-family:verdana, tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;
            font-size:xx-large; 
            border-color:#21BEE7;
            background-color:transparent;    
             /*background-color:#21BEE7;   */      
            border:solid 1px #c0c0c0;   
         }
     </style>

    <style type="text/css">
        .widgetFrame {
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }

        #accessbar {
            width: auto;
            height: 1px;
            position: relative;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px 0 0 0;
        }

        #accessbar li {
            position: absolute;
            display: block;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background-image: none;
        }

        #accessbar a {
            height: 1px;
            display: block;
            text-indent: -9999px;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .roundedcorners thead tr p {
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .visuallyHidden {
            display: none;
        }

        #socitm_info_box_content {
            z-index: 99;
        }

        .skip_content{
        position: absolute;
        top: 0px;
        left: -1000px;
        background: #000000;
        color: #ffffff;
        padding: 10px;
        font-size: 12px ;
        }
        .skip_content:focus{
            left: 0px;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
        /*Used to replace the style for transaction buttons because the <a> should wrap the button - Email from Jon 23/10/2013 */
        a.transButton{
            width:190px;
            height:109px;
            background:url("/images/spritesheet.jpg") no-repeat -325px -69px;
            margin-top:10px;
            margin-bottom:10px;
        }

        a.sidebar-button {
            padding-left:70px;
            display:block;
            text-decoration:none !important;
        }
        a.sidebar-button span.title{
            padding-top:15px;
            display:block;
            color:#11b3db;
            padding-right:30px;
            font-size:1.1em;
            line-height:1.1em;
        }
        a.sidebar-button span.subtitle{
            font-size:0.8em;
            padding-right:30px;
            color:#163c6d;
            display:block;
            line-height:1.1em;
            padding-top:5px;
        }
    </style>

    <script type="text/javascript">
		function disableButtonOnClick(oButton, sButtonText, sCssClass) {
			// set button to disabled so you can't click on it.       
			oButton.disabled = true;
			// change the text of the button.       
			oButton.value = sButtonText;
			// IE uses className for the css property.       
			oButton.setAttribute('className', sCssClass);
			// Firefox, Safari use class for the css property.  (doesn't hurt to do both).        
			oButton.setAttribute('class', sCssClass);
		}
    </script>
